creator: freebsdbugzilla@agneau.org
text:
According to https://pkg.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:13:aarch64/quarterly/ 
and pkg update , packages for freebsd 13.3 arm64 have not been update since 2024-Jul-09

https://pkg.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:14:aarch64/quarterly/
quarterly packages for freebsd 14 arm64 have not been updated since 2024-Jun-29 

Is there any new issue with arm64 pkg build ?

I do not understand https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/
is there any documentation about pkg-status to find out when quarterly pkg build for an architecure/version will be available ?

What is the expected normal time between quartely updates ?
